digigraphUrl.description: Base URL of DigiGraph (no trailing slash), e.g. http://127.0.0.1:8000

model.description: OpenAI-compatible model id (DigiGraph ignores id for routing; sitaas-rag enables Open WebUI-style blocks)

openwebuiFormat.description: If true, request Open WebUI tool formatting (<details> blocks)

apiKey.description: Bearer token when DIGI_API_KEY is set on DigiGraph
